generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance HistoricalTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data of crane operations stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SystemArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System architecture model created using Capella Arcadia methodology"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance DarTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital twin evolution model using DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotor, CartMotorController, HoistMotor, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart motor"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist motor"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, FaultLocalizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing historical crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultLocalizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance TrinamicTMC4671Eval : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Motor driver for precise stepper motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling software for crane design"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModel
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling tool using Arcadia method"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureModel, DarTwinModel
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal paths for crane movement based on current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryRecommendation
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs and stores historical crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccess
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of crane state via Grafana Dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated vs. measured trajectories for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlert
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for trajectory planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance FaultLocalizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs fault localization using time series data classification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies faults in crane operation using time series classification"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for threshold breaches in continuous validation of trajectories"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommends optimal paths for crane movement based on current conditions"
]

instance HistoricalDataAccess : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to historical data for analysis and validation"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane behavior for trajectory validation"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard view of crane operations"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service executed via the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with physical components (crane, controllers) and digital containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker) interconnected via MQTT and data flows."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models, kinematic model) and 'as operated' (real-time data logging and validation) lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against an acceptable threshold for validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for real-time signaling between physical and digital components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard deployed on a single personal computer via docker-compose."
]
